patch.value: Ecosystem-wide PM living-context audit & forward-backlog rebuild (2026-06-07)

Manual audit + inspection of ALL 1055 pm items against the entire pm-cli ecosystem (codebase, docs, tests, telemetry, Sentry). Finding: the forward/open backlog is empty again — all 9 capability epics have only closed children, so 'pm context' returns no actionable work, violating the philosophy 'project management = context management'. This plan rebuilds a rich, well-defined, non-duplicate OPEN forward backlog under every capability epic and fills ADR gaps, executed via 5 specialized read+write audit sub-agents (disjoint epic scopes) coordinated by the orchestrator, then shipped as a PR with full AI-bot review loop and merge.

Rebuild the living forward backlog (features/stories/tasks/chores/issues/improvements/ideas/goals) + ADR gaps across all capability epics; no source/code/docs changes (tracking-only); all new backlog items OPEN; new ADRs closed Decisions with final changelog regen.

value.text: Audit waves 1-5 complete: 71 OPEN backlog items created + AC backfilled + dedupe sweep clean (0 dups) + validate/health ok + 2 ADRs recorded. Proceeding to consolidation, commit, PR, bot-review loop.

Done. audit-observability-agent: 10 items under pm-5oj5 + audit Story pm-lzrq; live telemetry+Sentry observed healthy; flagged retry-exhaustion visibility (pm-irc7). No secrets in items.
Done. audit-docs-tests-agent: 16 items under pm-u9d0 + audit Story pm-5dbn; flagged CodeQL float-tag (pm-ji5c) + ARCHITECTURE/docs drift.
Done. Recorded 2 ADRs: pm-7sq6 (coverage governance), pm-cc04 (agent self-repair via remediation registry). ADR log now 29.

Initial bot responses: Gemini quota limit, Codex connector setup unavailable, Sourcery weekly diff-character rate limit, CodeRabbit skipped full review because PR has 158 files (8 over 150-file limit). CI, Docs, and CodeQL still running after latest push.

value.author: maintainer-agent
value.text: CI fix evidence: PR #143 Gates (static) failed in pnpm security:scan because pm-97yv contained local release-operation details: an absolute home path and shell-token note. Sanitized pm-97yv body via pm update and redacted the historical literals with pm history-redact; redaction verify_ok true. Local verification after fix: pnpm security:scan passed; direct changelog generate --check passed; pnpm contracts:check passed; pnpm quality:static passed; npm pack --dry-run passed; pm validate --check-resolution --check-history-drift ok:true with history_drift ok and the known older resolution warnings.
